description_long: This object is a pair of eyeglasses featuring distinctive octagonal lenses set within a full-rim frame. The frame appears robust and angular, with straight, thick temples that extend back and curve downward at the ends for a secure fit behind the ears. The bridge connecting the two lenses is straight and solid, matching the geometric style of the overall design. The lenses are lightly tinted, providing a subtle contrast to the metallic sheen of the frame. The glasses have a vintage, almost steampunk aesthetic, with no visible embellishments or engravings on the temples or frame. No brand logo or insignia is visible on any part of the glasses.
description: A pair of octagonal-lensed glasses with a thick, metallic full-rim frame and straight temples, featuring a vintage geometric design and lightly tinted lenses.
description_view_0: Front view showing the octagonal lenses, full-rim frame, and straight bridge.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick, straight temple and the angular profile of the frame.
description_view_2: Rear-angled view displaying both temples extended and the geometric frame structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other temple and the consistent thickness of the frame.
attribute_frame_design: The frame has a bold, geometric design with octagonal rims encircling each lens. It is a full-rim style, with thick, straight temples and a solid, straight bridge. The overall structure is angular and robust, giving the glasses a vintage or steampunk-inspired appearance.
attribute_lens_tint: The lenses are lightly tinted gray, offering a subtle shade without strong coloration or mirrored effects. They appear transparent with no visible gradient or special effects.
attribute_bridge_style: The bridge is a straight, solid bar connecting the two lenses, matching the angular and geometric style of the frame. It does not feature nose pads or additional shaping.
attribute_temple_detailing: The temples are thick, straight, and angular, curving downward at the ends. There are no visible engravings, patterns, or embellishments; the design is clean and consistent with the frame's geometric style.
